rows.label: qev051511_MSG0002
rows.name:
No, my stomach was full, and that
was every ounce of strength I could muster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051511_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ah, so frustrating! I was planning on using the prize money
from winning to stuff myself even more![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051511_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hey, since it's come to this, you have to win the tournament
and treat me to a huge feast of meat, alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051511_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm counting on you! I hear there's some incomprehensible powerhouse
they're calling "Peerless", but
you absolutely must not lose![ST:wait ]
